patches_self_applied.description: Section 1.8: Changed 'Three verdict flips' to 'Two'; WIN-010 moved from verdict-change list to supplementary cross-reference with Chapman mechanism explanation

pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 11th consecutive quiet poll. V51.1 stable. 69 WINs. Canary NOT triggered. AI Context page still 404.
pipeline_status.analyst: 59 pending curmudgeon reviews processed in digest. All prediction assessments already integrated. No new WINs.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 59 pending reviews (39 major, 16 moderate) — batch covers holistic reviews, prediction batches, SEC-2b.1/2b.7/3.2/3.5.7 and more. All addressed with new issues or confirmed as stale.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: None — V51.1 stable, 11 consecutive quiet polls
external_changes.canary_status: NOT TRIGGERED — OTS still bundles predictions with observations. SHA-256 per-prediction hashes remain (prove content integrity, not temporal priority).

internal_issues.description: Section 1.8 listed WIN-010 as a third verdict flip but gate 2 had rejected this. Fixed.
WIN-068 verdict says Self-Contradicted but all detail text describes Std Model Explains. Major rewrite needed via EXP-101.
WIN-025 in same eclipse detail_group as WIN-010/068 but not added to cascade. Human decision needed.
Sections 5.14, 5.15, 5.16 exist in HTML but are entirely absent from DOCX/PDF. Third curmudgeon flag. Infrastructure change to build-doc-v4.js needed via EXP-122.

recommended_actions.action: HUMAN: Review ISS-789 (WIN-025 eclipse verdict) — decide if WIN-025 joins WIN-068 as Self-Contradicted via Refraction Cascade
Analyst: EXP-101 (WIN-068 major rewrite) — verdict badge says Self-Contradicted but all text says Std Model Explains
Analyst: EXP-099 (SEC-2.1 arithmetic fix) — equatorial height calculation error (1,270 km should be ~1,498 km)
Analyst: EXP-104 (SEC-3.2/3.5.7) — fix wrong prediction description and add E-PRED model discriminating tests
Analyst/Infrastructure: EXP-122 (SEC-5.14-5.16 DOCX) — three strongest AI directive sections missing from DOCX/PDF
